prestazioni: Engine: 4G63T (G63B) 2.0L turbocharged inline-4 with forged internals (JE 87mm pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL race bearings) and balanced crankshaft for 8,500 RPM redline. Turbo upgrade to Garrett GT35R with 0.82 A/R turbine housing and 57mm billet compressor wheel, paired with a Tomei 272° camshaft and titanium retainers for high-RPM stability.

Fuel System: Dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps feeding 1,000cc ID1000 injectors, controlled via Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with flex-fuel capability. Custom 3-inch stainless steel intercooler piping with a GReddy Type-R front-mount intercooler (700hp core) and HKS SSQV blow-off valve for boost response.

Drivetrain & Suspension: OS Giken twin-plate clutch with 2.2L flywheel for rapid gear changes, paired with a Quaife ATB differential in a reinforced Ralliart transaxle. Ohlins DFV coilovers with 8-way adjustable damping and spherical bearing top mounts, alongside Cusco 22mm front sway bar and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar for chassis rigidity.
estetica: Body: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion with custom carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts. Custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the roof and mirrors. Seibon carbon fiber hood with functional vents for heat extraction.

Wheels & Brakes: Work Meister S1 3P 16x9.5 +15 front and 16x11 +20 rear wheels, wrapped in Toyo R888R 245/45/16 and 295/40/16 tires. StopTech Big Brake Kit with 4-piston calipers, 328mm rotors, and Ferodo DS2500 pads for track-capable stopping power.

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, bolted to a custom roll cage by Cusco. Momo Prototipo steering wheel with quick-release hub, paired with a Defi Advance BF gauge cluster (boost, oil pressure, water temp, and EGT) mounted on a custom A-pillar pod.
